rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EROY LISHER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion By Nancy Jo Elisher Dinkends For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Nancy Jo Elisher Dinkens's Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is granted with leave to amend. Any amended petition shall be filed no later than August 26, 2015. With regard to the equitable adoption claim, the amended pleading must allege sufficient facts to show decedent Eroy Lisher intended to adopt petitioners (Melikaya White, Courtney White, and Patrick Dennis). With regard to the second claim (that Decedent is Joyce Dennis White's "presumed natural father,") the amended pleading must allege sufficient facts to show that petitioners have standing to bring their claim. The prevailing party shall prepare the proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on 7/21/2015.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For 1) Breach Of Trust;20 Probate Code Sec Sec 850 Relief; 3) Elder Finanancial Abuse; Etc.
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 8/5/15. An endorsed filed copy of the trust petition and supporting documents must be delivered to the probate examiners in room 202 at least 3 days prior to continued date. Proposed order has also not been submitted [Local Rule 14.6.A]. Courtesy copy of opposition also has not been provided. Though petition has not been reviewed, it is noted that proper venue has not been alleged.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SANDRA JANE BUTLER
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: continued to August 19, 2015. Although the examiner's notes clearly stated an amended petition should NOT be filed, an amended petition was filed. As stated in those notes, an amended petition requires the same notice (including publication) as the petition it amends (CRC 7.53.). Petitioner must re-publish and give new notice for the continued hearing date.
